---
applyTo: "apps/web/**"
---
# Web i18n rules

- Library: **next-intl**. Default locale: `ru`. Supported: `ru`, `en`, `uk`.
- All user-visible text must come from a message catalog. No literal strings in JSX, alt text, aria-label, toast messages, validation errors, etc.
- Add the key to **all three** files: `apps/web/messages/ru.json`, `apps/web/messages/en.json`, `apps/web/messages/uk.json`. RU is authoritative copy; EN/UK translations may be marked `[TODO]` when unknown, but the key must exist.
- Namespacing: dot-separated, grouped by feature (e.g. `training.session.start`, `drill.library.title`).
- Server components: `import { getTranslations } from 'next-intl/server'`.
- Client components: `import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'`.
- Dates/numbers via `useFormatter` — never `toLocaleString` directly.
- Pluralization via ICU MessageFormat in the catalog.
- When renaming or removing a key, remove it from all three files in the same change.
